description:
Azure RemoteStackManagement ImportData — UAMI + Federated Identity
Credential the manager uses to act on this stack via Azure AD.

clientId.description: Management UAMI client id (used by the manager to call AAD).

managementPermissionsApplied.description:
Whether the management role assignments were applied by the
generated stack.

resourceGroup.description: Resource group containing the management identity.

subscriptionId.description: Subscription ID containing the management identity.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID containing the management identity.
